title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed editor now supports running local AI models including Gemma-4 12B and Qwen-3.6 through LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp integrations. Users can leverage coding assistants locally without relying on cloud providers, maintaining code privacy and enabling flexible switching between local and cloud models.
